mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_token (user_id, token_type, token_value, token_name, read_permission, write_permission, status, expire_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tokenType}, #{tokenValue}, #{tokenName}, #{readPermission}, #{writePermission}, #{status}, #{expireTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, token_type, token_value, token_name, read_permission, write_permission, status, expire_time, last_used_time, create_time, update_time, deleted_at FROM user_token WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, token_type, token_value, token_name, read_permission, write_permission, status, expire_time, last_used_time, create_time, update_time, deleted_at FROM user_token WHERE token_value = #{tokenValue}

SELECT id, user_id, token_type, token_value, token_name, read_permission, write_permission, status, expire_time, last_used_time, create_time, update_time, deleted_at FROM user_token WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND token_type = #{tokenType} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, token_type, token_value, token_name, read_permission, write_permission, status, expire_time, last_used_time, create_time, update_time, deleted_at FROM user_token WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND token_type = 'API_KEY' AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_token SET read_permission = #{readPermission}, write_permission = #{writePermission}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
UPDATE user_token SET last_used_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE token_value = #{tokenValue} AND status = 1
UPDATE user_token SET status = 0, deleted_at = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_token WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND token_type = 'API_KEY' AND status = 1
